serStmt.serInfo: Kruger, L. Tobacco and Waterpipe Use Survey 2013 [dataset]. Version 1. Cape Town: Economics of Tobacco Control Project [producer], 2018. Cape Town: DataFirst [distributor], 2018. DOI: https://doi.org/1025858/8hcg-1h77

verStmt.version: v1: Edited anonymised data for public access

stdyInfo.abstract: The aim of this study was to determine the prevalence of the use of tobacco products and waterpipes and to investigate the associated correlates, in particular perceptions and beliefs about the adverse health consequences of waterpipe use and its social acceptability. The study involved the administration of an email survey to all students at the four resident universities in the Western Cape Province of South Africa during September 2013. 4578 students completed the survey (4.3% response rate). The Western Cape Universities are Stellenbosch University (SU), Cape Peninsula University of Technology (CPUT), the University of Cape Town (UCT), and the University of the Western Cape (UWC).

sumDscr.geogCover: The survey was specific to four universities in the Western Cape Province of South Africa
sumDscr.universe: The universe of interest was students at four Western Cape universities.

stdyInfo.notes: The survey collected data on students' age, sex, race, religion, language, ownership of certain items, fee sources, and physical activity. Data was also collected on attitudes to and use of alchohol, marijuana, tobacco products and waterpipes.

useStmt.citReq: Kruger, L. Tobacco and Waterpipe Use Survey 2013 [dataset]. Version 1. Cape Town: Economics of Tobacco Control Project [producer], 2018. Cape Town: DataFirst [distributor], 2018. DOI: https://doi.org/1025858/8hcg-1h77
useStmt.conditions: Public use files, available to all

catgry.catValu: Congo, the Democratic Republic of the
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
1 or 2 times in the past year
2 to 3 times a month, on average
3 to 11 times in the past year
I did not drink any alcohol in the past year, but I did drink before then
I have never drunk any alcohol in my life
1 or 2 days in the past year
2 to 3 days a month, on average
3 to 11 days in the past year
one day a month, on average
one day a week, on average
two days a week, on average

var.labl: what type of tobacco did you first experiment with

var.name: q22

var.imputation: what is your experience of smoking cigarettes?
var.security: what is your experience of smoking cigarettes?
var.embargo: what is your experience of smoking cigarettes?
var.respUnit: what is your experience of smoking cigarettes?

catgry.catValu: I have tried cigarettes once or twice before but did not smoke them subsequently
I smoke cigarettes infrequently on a social level
I smoke cigarettes regularly (more than once a week but not daily)
I used to smoke cigarettes (infrequently or regularly) but do not smoke at all currently

var.name: q24
var.labl: have you tried to quit smoking?
var.imputation: have you tried to quit smoking?

var.embargo: have you tried to quit smoking?
var.respUnit: have you tried to quit smoking?

catgry.catValu: I dont smoke it anymore, no idea
i didn't think there was more than one brand available
I do not purchase my own hubbly bubbly tobacco
Golden Tuck Shop ( stellenbosch corner shop)
I don't - only smoke it if others are and I feel like joining
Wherever I am at the time
No, I have never used these substances with hubbly bubbly
Yes, less than 50% of the time
Yes, more than 50% of the time
I have never seen a packet of hubbly bubbly tobacco
Yes, but less dangerous than the smoke from other people's cigarettes
Yes, but more dangerous than the smoke from other people's cigarettes
Yes, equally dangerous as the smoke from other people's cigarettes
Yes, but less accessible than cigarette smoking
Yes, but more accessible than cigarette smoking
Yes, equally accessible as cigarette smoking
Yes, but equally difficult as quitting smoking cigarettes
Yes, but less difficult than quitting smoking cigarettes
Yes, but more difficult than quitting smoking cigarettes
